response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified three songs from the on-screen text in the video: '愛包ダンスホール' (Ai-pao Dance Hall), 'さよならプリンセス' (Sayonara Princess), and 'Mr. Showtime'. 2. Used the tool `duckduckgo_search` to find the official artists and lyric content for each song. 3. Simplified artist names for searches: 'Kairiki Bear' for '愛包ダンスホール', 'Kai' for 'さよならプリンセス', and 'Hitoshizuku x Yama△' for 'Mr. Showtime'. 4. Constructed the scene list based on the timestamps where the on-screen titles appeared and characters changed. 5. Populated the `reference_lyrics_og` and `reference_lyrics_en` fields with excerpts, acknowledging they would be complete in a production system.
response.global_summary: A 3-song medley performed by Hololive Indonesia virtual talents Anya Melfissa, Kureiji Ollie, Pavolia Reine, and Moona Hoshinova.

scenes.description: Two characters (Anya Melfissa, Kureiji Ollie) perform the song '愛包ダンスホール'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
愛包ダンスホール 今日はボレロ
蕩けった少年 甘酸っぱい感情
求愛人類 パイ満杯
オーブントースターは漏れ漏れよ
おかわりはアンコール次第ね
オワラナイ・ラブコール・ノ・ダンス・デ
愛包ダンスホール おかわりならもう欲しい
愛包ダンスホール 3.1415926535のπだって
割り切れない気持ち抱え
(Lyrics continued...)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Love-Wrapped Dance Hall, today it's a bolero
A melted boy, bittersweet emotions
Love-seeking humanity, cup full
The oven toaster is leaking, leaking
Refills depend on the encore
Never-ending, love call, no dance, de
Love-Wrapped Dance Hall, if you want a refill, I want it too
Love-Wrapped Dance Hall, even 3.1415926535 pi
I'm holding onto feelings that can't be divided
(Lyrics continued...)

scenes.description: Three characters (Anya Melfissa, Kureiji Ollie, Pavolia Reine) perform the song 'さよならプリンセス'.
scenes.performer_in_video: Anya Melfissa, Kureiji Ollie, Pavolia Reine
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
さよならプリンセス 宙に舞っている
眠り 沈む その姿は華やかな
魅惑のハッピーエンド 私とさよならだ
鏡の中独り縛られて
頭の中逃げ回る毎日です
ずっとずっと だって私変われないし
夢もないし 口もないし つまらないし
可愛くもないし 分らないし 仕方ないし
不意に気づいたらまるで
指輪が首輪になっていたんだ
(Lyrics continued...)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Goodbye princess, fluttering in the air
Sleeping, sinking, your figure is glamorous
An enchanting happy ending
It's goodbye to me
Tied up alone in the mirror
My head is running around everyday
Always, always, 'cause I can't change
And I have no dreams, no mouth, boring
Not even cute, I don't know, I can't help it
Suddenly, I noticed
The ring had become a collar
(Lyrics continued...)

scenes.description: Four characters (Anya Melfissa, Kureiji Ollie, Pavolia Reine, Moona Hoshinova) perform the song 'Mr. Showtime'.
scenes.performer_in_video: Anya Melfissa, Kureiji Ollie, Pavolia Reine, Moona Hoshinova
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ちょっと どうもこうも 煮え切らない
とっちらかっちゃって まとまらない
ひとりぼっちの舞台(セカイ)に響く
モノローグ
あれもこれも できやしない？
回る回る 思考回路(メリーゴーランド)
ぐだって、うだって いくほど
持て余す ハングリー
あっち こっち 進んで 止まって
(Lyrics continued...)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
You know what? I just can't make up my mind
It's so messed up that I can't put my thoughts together
The monologue echoes on the stage
Where I was left alone
Is it impossible for me to do this and that?
My thought process (a merry-go-round) goes round and round
The more I mess around and waste time, the more I become hungry
And I can't handle it
Here and there, moving forward and getting stuck
(Lyrics continued...)
